positive: A vibrant, geometric pattern illustration of abstract constellations and celestial bodies. Inspired by Art Deco posters, using symmetrical repeating elements. Deep indigo blue, gold foil accents, and turquoise accents. Vector illustration, seamless pattern suitable for fabric printing.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, messy lines, gradient noise, photo elements
